## ERT1.1. Effective use of reserved or segregated local airspace (PI#9) {#ert1.1.-effective-use-of-reserved-or-segregated-local-airspace-pi9 .Heading-2-ER}

ITALY report a ratio of **42%**

- BRINDISI ACC reports a ratio of **47%**

- MILANO ACC reports a ratio of **14%**

- PADOVA ACC reports a ratio of **48%**

- ROME ACC reports a ratio of **25%**
